programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The murder of a port authority officer reveals Parsa's possible whereabouts as the team continues the hunt for the terrorist intent on wiping out NCIS. Bishop reveals her past association with the quarry and suggests where she thinks he may be found, but the CIA has intercepted a call that places Parsa in a different location to Ellie's hunch. Mark Harmon and Emily Wickersham star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team uncovers faulty bulletproof vests in an abandoned truck filled with stolen USMC merchandise, and attempts to locate the source of the cargo and any vests that could have been sent to military personnel overseas. Crime drama, guest starring Challen Cates, with Mark Harmon

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain with Chris Tarrant
programme.desc: The broadcaster examines the role of the railways during the two global conflicts of the 20th century, keeping vital supply lines open and transporting troops to and from the front. In the First World War, railway works were converted into munitions factories and women were employed for these dangerous jobs and their heroic efforts helped win them the vote, while in the Second World War, they were vital in organising the evacuation of a million children and offered underground shelters from air raids

programme.title: Hell Is for Heroes (1962)
programme.desc: A rebellious soldier defies orders to lead two men on a secret attack on a German pillbox, but his mission fails and the other two soldiers are killed. Court-martialled for his actions, he remains convinced his plan was sound and ignores the sentence to make a second attempt at destroying the emplacement. Second World War adventure, with Steve McQueen, James Coburn and Bobby Darin

programme.title: The Tin Star (1957)
programme.desc: A world-weary bounty hunter, formerly a sheriff, arrives in a small town where a newly-appointed lawman is struggling to keep the peace. When he learns of the mercenary's past, the inexperienced lawman seeks his help in learning the tricks of the trade so he can bring an outlaw gang to justice. Anthony Mann's Western, starring Henry Fonda, Anthony Perkins, Lee Van Cleef, Betsy Palmer and Michel Ray

programme.title: The Longest Day (1962)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama chronicling the planning and execution of the Allied landings in Normandy on June 6, 1944, from the differing perspectives of the British, German, French and American forces. Starring Richard Burton, Richard Todd, Kenneth More, Sean Connery, John Wayne, Robert Mitchum, Henry Fonda, Curt Jurgens, Roddy McDowall and Rod Steiger

programme.title: Film4 Interview Programmes
programme.desc: Stars and directors talk about the experience of making movies in this compendium of personal and practical reflections

programme.title: The Book Thief (2013)
programme.desc: A girl separated from her family is raised by foster parents in Nazi Germany, who instill in her a love of reading. She is horrified by the book burnings and tries to save volumes from the flames, while she and her adoptive family provide a safe hiding place for a Jewish boy. Drama based on Markus Zusak's novel, starring Sophie Nelisse, Geoffrey Rush and Emily Watson

programme.title: Hidden Figures (2016)
programme.desc: As the space race reaches fever pitch in the early 1960s, a trio of female African-American mathematicians attempt to overcome prejudice and find work with NASA. Their remarkable skills prove vital in getting an astronaut into orbit and bringing him safely back to Earth, but to realise their potential they must overcome deep-seated prejudice in the space programme and society as a whole. Fact-based drama, starring Taraji P Henson, Octavia Spencer, Janelle Monae and Kevin Costner

programme.title: Second Coming (2014)
programme.desc: A happily married woman is shocked to discover she is pregnant as it has been months since she slept with her husband. Afraid of her spouse's reaction, she tries to keep the news to herself, but she cannot hide the truth indefinitely. Drama, starring Nadine Marshall, Idris Elba and Kai Francis Lewis

programme.title: Lost & Found (2017)
programme.desc: Comedy drama following seven interconnecting stories set in and around a lost and found office at an Irish train station. Written, directed by and starring Liam O Mochain, with Norma Sheahan and Brendan Conroy

programme.title: Run Wild, Run Free (1969)
programme.desc: Withdrawn, mute 10-year-old Philip is ignored by his parents and goes off to explore Dartmoor alone, where he meets a retired colonel who shares his knowledge of Devon's wildlife. Under the older man's nurturing tutelage, the boy begins to tame a wild white colt, but fate proffers a series of setbacks just as real progress is being made. Children's drama, starring John Mills, Mark Lester, Sylvia Syms and Bernard Miles

programme.title: The Last Command (1955)
programme.desc: Adventurer Jim Bowie returns to Texas during the 1830s and tries to quell the simmering antagonism between settlers and the Mexican government. However, as the Mexican army's aggression intensifies, he is forced to take up arms and fight in the historic battle at the Alamo. Western, starring Sterling Hayden, Arthur Hunnicutt, Anna Maria Alberghetti and Richard Carlson

programme.title: 7th Cavalry (1956)
programme.desc: An army officer is branded a coward for failing to fight in the Battle of the Little Bighorn, and is unable to convince anyone that official business had detained him. In a bid to repair his damaged reputation, he leads a cavalry detail to retrieve the dead from the battlefield. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Jay C Flippen and Jeanette Nolan

programme.title: Carry On Constable (1960)
programme.desc: A flu epidemic leaves a police station short of staff, forcing a desperate inspector to send four bungling trainees on the beat. The inept would-be bobbies manage to increase the crime rate even before they have started work, and their long-suffering sergeant faces an uphill battle to whip them into shape. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Kenneth Connor, Charles Hawtrey and Joan Sims

programme.title: Snow White & the Huntsman (2012)
programme.desc: An evil queen learns that her reign will last for ever if she kills a princess, so sends a renowned warrior to find and murder her. However, he comes to realise his mistress's evil ways, and instead trains his intended victim to fight so they can bring the tyrant's rule to an end. Fantasy adventure, with Kristen Stewart, Chris Hemsworth and Charlize Theron

programme.title: Hitman: Agent 47 (2015)
programme.desc: The latest in a long line of genetically engineered clones bred to be the perfect assassin takes on a mission that strikes close to home. A corporation intends to use the technology that created him to build an army of superhuman killers. As the assassin fights to bring them down, he uncovers the dark secrets surrounding his origin. Action thriller, starring Rupert Friend, Hannah Ware and Zachary Quinto

programme.title: Girls Trip (2017)
programme.desc: A lifestyle guru is offered the chance to be a keynote speaker at a music festival in New Orleans. She decides to invite three old friends she has drifted apart from, hoping to turn a working weekend into a wild vacation and a chance to rebuild their bonds. After a confrontation gets them kicked out of their hotel, they hit the streets of the Big Easy and reconnect with their wild sides. Comedy, starring Regina Hall, Queen Latifah, Tiffany Haddish and Jada Pinkett Smith

programme.title: Baywatch (2017)
programme.desc: A veteran lifeguard commands a highly trained team that keeps the sun-kissed resort of Emerald Bay safe. As he breaks in some new recruits - including an insubordinate former Olympic swimmer - he has to contend with a dangerous new drug sweeping the beach. Action comedy based on the TV series, starring Dwayne Johnson, Zac Efron, Alexandra Daddario and Priyanka Chopra

programme.title: Rugrats in Paris: The Movie (2000)
programme.desc: The lucky little tots embark on a trip to a French theme park - but while the rest of the gang are intent on enjoying themselves, Chuckie is distracted by his wish for a new mum. He sets his sights on the owner of the amusement park as a prospective partner for his single dad. Animated adventure, with the voices of Christine Cavanaugh, Elizabeth Daily, Cheryl Chase, Kath Soucie and Susan Sarandon

programme.title: The Ladykillers (1955)
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind and his gang come up with a cunning scheme to steal a fortune, but their plan is threatened by the unsuspecting elderly landlady of the boarding house they are staying in. They decide to dispose of her, which proves easier said than done. Classic Ealing comedy, with Alec Guinness, Peter Sellers, Herbert Lom, Katie Johnson, Cecil Parker, Danny Green and Jack Warner

programme.title: The Perfect Catch (2005)
programme.desc: Unlikely couple Ben and Lindsey meet and fall in love over the winter. When summer brings a new baseball season, Lindsey discovers Ben's devotion to the Boston Red Sox baseball team knows no bounds - and suspects she will always come second. The Farrelly brothers' romantic comedy, starring Jimmy Fallon and Drew Barrymore, inspired by Nick Hornby's football-themed novel Fever Pitch, but with America's favourite sport replacing Britain's

programme.title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (1992)
programme.desc: Hapless youngster Kevin somehow manages to catch the wrong plane and finds himself heading for New York, while his family jets off to Florida. Having got his hands on his father's credit card, he is enjoying the good life staying in a luxury hotel - until he bumps into two familiar burglars with an axe to grind. Comedy sequel, starring Macaulay Culkin, Joe Pesci, Daniel Stern, Brenda Fricker and Tim Curry

programme.title: Eddie the Eagle (2016)
programme.desc: Biopic of British sporting underdog Eddie Edwards. Determined to fulfil his dreams of becoming an Olympic athlete, Edwards trains as a ski jumper - a field in which Britain had no other competitors. He secures a place in the 1988 Winter Olympics, where his can-do attitude makes him a media sensation in the face of a losing streak. Starring Taron Egerton, Hugh Jackman and Christopher Walken

programme.title: X-Men: Apocalypse (2016)
programme.desc: The mutant heroes face the oldest and most powerful of their kind, an ancient Egyptian tyrant who is restored to life in the 1980s and plans to destroy civilisation and rebuild it in his own image. Superhero adventure sequel, starring James McAvoy, Michael Fassbender, Jennifer Lawrence and Oscar Isaac

programme.title: Insidious: Chapter 3 (2015)
programme.desc: Gifted psychic Elise Rainier reluctantly agrees to use her ability to contact the dead in order to help a teenage girl who has been targeted by a dangerous supernatural entity. Horror prequel, starring Dermot Mulroney, Stefanie Scott and Lin Shaye

programme.title: The Wolverine (2013)
programme.desc: The former member of the X-Men is lured out of hiding and travels to Japan, where a dying businessman offers him the chance to give up his immortality for a normal life. He ends up robbed of his superhuman powers by a mysterious scientist and is forced to protect the tycoon's granddaughter from a secret conspiracy's assassins. Superhero adventure spin-off, starring Hugh Jackman and Tao Okamoto

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina's Aunt Vesta pays an unexpected visit from the Other Realm, and is determined to show her niece the lighter side of life. Raquel Welch guest stars

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina's job as a magician's assistant is short-lived when she accidentally makes the boss disappear

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted and Robin start having casual sex, so Barney tries to resolve their domestic issues to stop them sleeping together. Meanwhile, Marshall begins to feel uncomfortable about using the toilet at work. Starring Josh Radnor and Cobie Smulders

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Lily's journey home after a trip to Seattle is disrupted by a blizzard, which threatens to interfere with her routine of meeting Marshall at airports after work trips. Elsewhere, Ted and Barney offer to watch the bar at MacLaren's while they wait for their dates. Starring Alyson Hannigan and Jason Segel

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Jimmy's brother Billy and his family invite themselves over to celebrate Thanksgiving with the DiMeos, who were hoping to avoid another horrible holiday

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Maya enlists the family to assist JJ in romancing his fellow student Claire, but her plan backfires when JJ expresses his feelings and they are not reciprocated. Frustrated by the family's chronic tardiness, Ray insists that they practise getting to school on time to ensure that he doesn't miss his upcoming field trip

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is invited to visit the Large Hadron Collider in Switzerland and asks Penny to join him as a Valentine's Day treat. However, Sheldon tries to persuade the couple to allow him to take her place

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon misses an opportunity to meet Spider-Man co-creator Stan Lee when he has to go to court for driving through a red light, and his anger leads to his imprisonment. Penny finds out the address of the comic-book writer and takes Sheldon there - but his troubles with the law have yet to reach their conclusion and the visit does not go as expected

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray is angered when he finds out that Adam has no interest in auditioning for a school stage production. Meanwhile, Beverly interferes with Erica's latest career plan

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray grow concerned about Adam's obsession with toys, so try to distract him with a new hobby. Meanwhile, Erica's band the Dropouts decide to audition for reality television talent show Star Search, but their egos threaten the band's future

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Diaz tries to soothe Jeffords' ego after a professional setback. Meanwhile, Santiago spends some precious time with Captain Holt. Crime comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jeffords wants to file an official complaint against a fellow police officer who stops him in his own neighbourhood while he is off duty, but Captain Holt has other ideas. Peralta and Santiago glimpse the difficulties of parenthood when they babysit for Jeffords' children

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang's preparations for Star Wars Day are interrupted by the news that Professor Proton has died. Leonard and Penny attend the funeral, where they talk about their rejected marriage proposals, but Sheldon has difficulty dealing with the death of his childhood hero - until a surprise visitor helps him cope with his grief. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with a guest appearance by Bob Newhart

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny gets fired from the movie, prompting her to take a serious look at her life. Raj receives advice from Sheldon after he sees Emily on a date with another man at the cinema, while Howard's mother breaks her leg. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD, Elliot and Turk start training their first medical students, finally getting a chance to dispense knowledge instead of receiving it. However, not all the new faces are keen to learn. Comedy, starring Zach Braff and Donald Faison

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD berates himself for not having been nicer to a cancer patient who dies while undergoing treatment. Dr Cox's romance with Kristen heats up, and Elliot becomes obsessed by an old song that may contain the voice of Dr Kelso. American comedy, starring Zach Braff, Kelli Williams and John C McGinley

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: When Dylan asks Maya not to give her a birthday party, Maya throws an amazing surprise bash anyway but soon learns the real reason why her daughter didn't want to celebrate. Ray panics when JJ sets off on a day of independence at the shopping mall to buy Dylan a present. Jimmy and Kenneth struggle to find something they have in common

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Ray takes sides when Maya dents a nearby car and he leaves a note to the other driver behind Maya's back. Jimmy and Dylan share a moment as they search in the back room at the local supermarket for Dylan's favourite soft drink, while JJ teaches a rude customer a lesson, and Kenneth tries to hide the fact that he has been moonlighting

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Now that he's officially back at the precinct and desperate to solve a real criminal case, Peralta finds a loophole to get out of his temporarily designated desk duty. Unfortunately, that loophole rests on his ability to pass an official evaluation performed by Captain Holt. While Boyle provides Peralta with moral support, Jeffords and Santiago help Diaz, who believes Pimento may be cheating on her

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct embarks on its fifth annual Halloween Heist and, as usual, everybody has a plan and no one is safe. Relationships and friendships are tested in the competition to win a spectacular championship belt and the title 'Amazing Human Slash Genius' by midnight, leaving all the members of the squad pitted against one another

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Despite Beverly wanting the two boys to bond, Adam and Johnny Atkins compete for the head of the Highlander Club at school; Barry tries to ensure that the JTP doesn't fall out of touch after high school

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica, Barry and Adam are not happy when their distant relative Gleb visits from Russia - until they realise he can make their lives easier. Beverly starts working on her cookbook, which causes tension with the Frentas

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang re-creates a prom night on the roof of the apartment building when the girls decide they would like to re-enact their evenings with their current partners. However, Sheldon feels under pressure to take part in all the romantic traditions, and Howard worries about who Stuart will bring as his date. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon panics when Leonard announces he has to go into hospital for surgery, and the impending divorce of Raj's parents motivates Howard and Bernadette to work on their own marriage. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies sets challenges for Roisin Conaty, Tim Key, Romesh Ranganathan, Frank Skinner and Josh Widdicombe. They have to fill an egg cup with tears, remember an Aussie rules football team and play Taskmaster squash

Meanwhile, Will takes a shine to new girl Lauren - but she is only interested in Simon. Comedy, starring Simon Bird

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is unhappy about being forced by Mr Gilbert to take a work experience job at a garage due to a mix-up that sees Neil joining a newspaper. Meanwhile, Jay sorts out a placement for himself and Simon at his father's plant hire company. Starring Simon Bird and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Jen acquires an admirer, but her inability to tell the truth results in his romantic gesture going horribly wrong. Meanwhile, Moss and Roy decide to test out a lonely hearts website. Comedy, starring Chris O'Dowd, Richard Ayoade and Katherine Parkinson

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Jen ponders what could lie behind the department's mysterious red door - and when she eventually gets it open, she uncovers the story of a leading executive's sudden fall from grace. Meanwhile, Roy runs the risk of being labelled a 'desk rabbit'. The Mighty Boosh's Noel Fielding guest stars in the comedy, with Chris O'Dowd, Richard Ayoade and Katherine Parkinson

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Giles discovers an ancient prophecy is about to come true, and a powerful new foe known as the Anointed One will soon come into being - but Buffy is more concerned with having finally got a date with a handsome classmate she has a crush on. The exasperated watcher goes in search of the Anointed One himself, only to end up having to fight off a band of vampires

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: The vampire asks Cordelia and Welsey to investigate the mysteriously abandoned Hyperion Hotel, and as they examine the building's history, they discover their boss has a much more personal connection to the premise than originally suspected

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: During one of their adventures in outer space, Rick and Morty's ship suffers a flat tyre. While they carry out repairs, Morty suffers a potentially lethal snake bite that leads to a complicated, time-travelling encounter with a snake civilisation

programme.title: YOLO: Crystal Fantasy
programme.desc: Part one of two. After one drink too many, Rachel stumbles into the bushes to go to the toilet and unwittingly falls through a portal into another dimension. Sarah waits patiently for her to return, but hours turn into months - and months turn into years

programme.title: The Jellies!
programme.desc: The residents of Walla Walla shelter from a storm in the Jelly household, leading to a fight for control of the TV remote

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: On one of their jaunts, Rick, Morty and Summer encounter a spaceship that has been attacked and taken over by an assimilating hive mind named Unity. Rick admits he used to date Unity, but Summer objects to Unity's control over the population of a nearby alien planet

programme.title: The Inbetweeners

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Harvey asks Sabrina to join a martial arts class with him, so she casts a spell to make herself an instant kung fu master

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Robin faces being deported back to Canada unless she can find work in seven days, and after an unsuccessful interview for a newsreader position, Barney helps her create a video to impress a TV channel. With employment on their minds, the other gang members discuss various achievements on their CVs that are irrelevant to their current careers - including Lily's hot-dog eating title. Starring Cobie Smulders, Neil Patrick Harris and Alyson Hannigan

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: The friends become suspicious when Barney turns down an attractive woman, and decide to follow him home, where they discover he has hired an actress and a child actor to pretend to be his wife and son, making his mother believe he has settled down

programme.title: Speechless

programme.title: Speechless

Worried that he won't get into college, Ray tries to enhance his CV by joining the school choir. He is given a coveted solo spot but faces competition from JJ

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends fight over a ring they believe was used in the Lord of the Rings film trilogy. Leonard hopes to return the item to its rightful owner - but Raj wishes to sell it so he can buy a jet ski, and Sheldon develops a Gollum-like obsession with the precious object

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is awarded a prestigious prize by the university, but is scared of collecting the gong at a ceremony because he knows he'll have to give a speech. Penny tries to gee him up with rousing references to X-Men, and Leonard and Raj offer psychological guidance - without much success

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members head to the annual Tri-State Cop-Con event, which is usually their excuse for a big party. However, their fun is threatened when Captain Holt asks them to be on their best behaviour.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

Boyle buys a food truck that was formerly the site of a brutal double murder, to the horror of his only investor in the project, Santiago. Hitchcock and Scully have an unusual challenge for Dia. Cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Vulture makes an unwelcome return to Peralta and Santiago's lives, threatening to swoop in and take something important away from them. Meanwhile, Boyle and Diaz must track down kidnapped NYPD horse Sergeant Peanut Butter, and Holt challenges Jeffords to be less image-conscious. Cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Adam team up to do a mother-son cooking show on public access television. Meanwhile, when Barry ruins the one college letter of recommendation he is able to get, Murray must step in to help

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is thrilled when he is asked to design his own video game for a school project. Beverly is worried about the extent of Pops' gambling, so ropes Bill Lewis into her latest scheme

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon bids an emotional goodbye to Fun with Flags as he and Amy record the final instalment of the internet show. Leonard, Howard and Raj clear out the office of a recently deceased professor and take a peek at his research. Guest starring LeVar Burton

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy pulls out all the stops as she hosts a traditional Victorian Christmas Eve dinner for the friends. Meanwhile, Raj's father comes to visit, and the guys do their best to free a bird they accidentally let into the university clean room. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Looking back at the very first episode of the soap from 1995, as viewers are introduced to characters including Tony Hutchinson, Kurt Benson and Jambo for the first time

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: One-time series heart-throb Jeremy Edwards, otherwise known as Kurt Benson, provides a menu of home-made sushi, monkfish curry and a big, bold, brash birthday cake. But will a night of fine dining and all things Hollyoaks be enough to see him win the £1,000 for charity?

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies sets more tasks for comedians including Frank Skinner. He takes a boulder onto a train for a pleasant excursion. Then he, Roisin Conaty, Tim Key, Romesh Ranganathan and Josh Widdicombe try to make a Swedish man blush

programme.title: Ghostbusters (2016)
programme.desc: When a series of supernatural disturbances occurs in New York City, two experts in the paranormal investigate, joined by a brilliant inventor who has created an array of ghost-hunting gadgets and a public transport worker whose knowledge of the city provides vital clues to the sinister cause of the ghostly activity. Reboot of the 1980s comedy franchise, starring Kristen Wiig, Melissa McCarthy, Kate McKinnon, Leslie Jones and Chris Hemsworth

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: During a field trip to the zoo, Xander and four other students are taken over by the spirits of hyenas. The five possessed teenagers form a savage gang, and as Xander develops a cruel new personality and rejects Willow, his fellow pack members progress from bullying weaker students to killing and eating the principal

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: A disturbing dream makes Cordelia realise Gunn may be his own worst enemy - but she is forced to face the fact she cannot save him without the help of Angel and Wesley

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: When parasites threaten to take over the world by placing memories in people's heads and multiplying through flashbacks, the Smith house is locked down. Rick warns the family to be cautious of wacky, zany characters that may appear, and decides to build blast shields around the house to stop people coming it or out

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Programmes including The Andrew Marr Show, I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!, The Snowman, First Dates, The Apprentice and The Secret Life of the Zoo come under the armchair critics' gaze as they share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week. The programme captures their instant reactions and lively discussions from the comfort of their own homes. First aired in December 2018

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Part-time wrestler Lewis, 19, returns to the restaurant for a second chance as he sits down with 20-year-old barista Lauren, while hotel inspector Alasdair, 55, and 54-year-old DJ Lee bond over their shared love of pop music. Stu, who's 42, lost his sight 13 years ago and hopes to meet a redhead to settle down with, and his date is 37-year-old Bristol nurse Jen, who has been single for eight years and is looking for a man to ignite the flames of love

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Raj take a heartbroken Howard to Las Vegas, where they pay a prostitute to spend time with him. Meanwhile, Sheldon finds himself locked out of his apartment and forced to stay the night at Penny's. With guest star Jodi Lynn O'Keefe (Prison Break)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon returns to Texas in disgrace when he discovers his friends tampered with the Arctic expedition data after growing tired of his quest for a scientific breakthrough. Elsewhere, Leonard becomes frustrated as constant interruptions hamper his attempts to woo Penny

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends fight over a ring they believe was used in the Lord of the Rings film trilogy. Leonard hopes to return the item to its rightful owner - but Raj wishes to sell it so he can buy a jet ski, and Sheldon develops a Gollum-like obsession with the precious object

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is awarded a prestigious prize by the university, but is scared of collecting the gong at a ceremony because he knows he'll have to give a speech. Penny tries to gee him up with rousing references to X-Men, and Leonard and Raj offer psychological guidance - without much success

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of the owners of Hannah & Mason's, a French bistro in Cranbury, New Jersey. Members of staff complain their pay cheques bounce, and the kitchen cooler is so unhygienic that Gordon makes the decision to close the restaurant on Valentine's Day - the busiest night of the year

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help a struggling seafood restaurant in Manhattan, where the three owners regularly come into conflict as they each try to assert their authority over the business, causing confusion for all. When one of the trio stubbornly resists the changes the Scottish chef is hoping to implement, sparks begin to fly

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: The return of the programme in which Jo Frost offers child-rearing advice to parents. In the opening edition, she helps working parents Jessica and CJ Braido, who feel they're being overrun by their four small children, and struggle to agree on what parenting methods to adopt

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back south Londoner Daniel wants to get his wedding grooving like a Caribbean street carnival. However, sensible student bride Sabrina dreams of a more traditional occasion and a wedding her parents will be proud of. While Sabrina pictures a tranquil location, Daniel splashes the cash on trucks and sound systems

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Beauty queen and bride-to-be Yasmin has her heart set on a fairy-tale wedding. Powerlifter Yiannis is taking Yasmin's dream to the extreme, but will she be the belle of the ball, or will the nuptials have an ugly twist in the tale?

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Tristan struggles as Verity and Charlie continue to grow closer, while back in Chelsea, Zara reveals a secret that shatters Sam's world

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present the halfway point of the culinary contest, with pastry week. The bakers must put their own stamp on a Cornish classic and are set a retro technical challenge. For the showstopper round, they must concoct a classic tart in a pastry cage, before judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood decide who will be this week's star baker and who will be going home

programme.title: The House of Magic (2013)
programme.desc: A stray cat wanders into a magician's mansion, and finds it is full of strange gadgets. The illusionist allows him to stay, to the annoyance of his other pets, but the cat proves an invaluable addition to the group when their owner's scheming nephew plots to take the house for himself. Animated adventure, with the voices of Murray Blue and Doug Stone

programme.title: Snoopy and Charlie Brown: The Peanuts Movie (2015)
programme.desc: The long-suffering youngster hopes his lifelong run of bad luck will come to an end when he develops a crush on a new schoolfriend. His beloved dog has more important things to worry about, as he dreams of taking to the skies in his airborne kennel. Animated comedy, with the voices of Noah Schnapp and Bill Melendez

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon decides to put his formidable brain power to use in devising a scientific procedure for making friends. However, to prove his findings he must first win the trust of fellow scientist Barry Kripke to gain access to a powerful computer. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and John Ross Bowie

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny runs into money troubles, so Sheldon offers to lend her some cash to help her pay the rent. However, when Leonard discovers his neighbour's ex-boyfriend Kurt is the cause of her financial woes, he gathers the gang for a confrontation. Starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny share an intimate moment as they recover from a psychological deconstruction by the physicist's mother, an expert in psychiatry and neural sciences. Guest starring Mamma Mia! actress Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions between Sheldon and Penny reach a new high after a paintballing accident leaves an ugly stain on the awkward physicist's favourite sofa cushion. Meanwhile, romance blossoms between Leslie and Howard. Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon, Howard and Raj discover actress Summer Glau is on their train while travelling to San Francisco. Desperate to discuss the Terminator TV series with her, the friends devise a number of plans to engage her in conversation. With Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny starts her own hair accessories business and the orders start to pile in. However, she makes the mistake of asking Sheldon to help, leading to frustration and regret. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny feels threatened when a sexy actress, who has landed a role in TV series CSI, moves into the apartment building, and gradually begins to sense that her friends are being manipulated by the new arrival. Comedy, starring Kaley Cuoco, Valerie Azlynn, Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny catches the eye of comic-book shopkeeper Stuart, and Leonard is devastated when she gives serious consideration to dating her new admirer. Desperate for help, Leonard enlists Sheldon to discredit his love rival by preying on his obsession with Batman. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Kevin Sussman star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Raj take a heartbroken Howard to Las Vegas, where they pay a prostitute to spend time with him. Meanwhile, Sheldon finds himself locked out of his apartment and forced to stay the night at Penny's. With guest star Jodi Lynn O'Keefe (Prison Break)

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne sets more tricky, puzzling and downright idiotic challenges for the celebrities, before Greg Davies decides who deserves the most points. Highlights include Johnny Vegas yelling from a tall chair, Katherine Parkinson forgetting how balloons work and Richard Herring flailing about in a dinghy. It remains to be seen what Daisy May Cooper and Mawaan Rizan will be doing - but it's unlikely to be dignified

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Devious Greg Davies tries to spot our five camouflaged comics, before the gang attempt to herd some dogs and chickens

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies sets tasks to comics including Mel Giedroyc and Noel Fielding, with Alex Horne and Noel Fielding dancing like a pair of shrews

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The fly-on-the-wall series turning the cameras on TV's most vocal armchair critics returns, as the show's regular gaggle of families, friends and viewing party acquaintances settle down to share their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques on what they have been watching during the week from the comfort of their own sofas. In this episode they appraise The Greatest Dancer, Small Fortune, Cold Feet, Famous and Fighting Crime, The Making of Me and the news

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share more of their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the week's biggest and best shows, including This Morning, The Chase Celebrity Special, Baptiste, The Sex Clinic and Child Genius. Narrated by Craig Cash. First aired in March 2019

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Laboratory engineer Daniel, 39, attempts to keep his nerves under control when he meets 29-year-old lingerie designer Lauren, while six foot three firefighter Nikki hopes rugby player Ross will sweep her off her feet. Call centre worker Zoe, 21, is looking for an intelligent and ladylike bookworm and sits down for a meal with Grace, a well-read 22-year-old physics student with a penchant for grammatical correctness, and HR adviser Leah, 34, is matched with 37-year-old blue-eyed boy Andy from Middlesbrough

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: French-born Gladys comes from a family of aristocrats and is searching for her perfect English gentleman to take home to visit the castle. Will Accountant and ballroom dancing enthusiast Robert sweep her off her feet? Used-car salesman Joey meets fashion blogger Jodie, and a chance encounter the night before their date provides an initial spark

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back south Londoner Daniel wants to get his wedding grooving like a Caribbean street carnival. However, sensible student bride Sabrina dreams of a more traditional occasion and a wedding her parents will be proud of. programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted and Robin start having casual sex, so Barney tries to resolve their domestic issues to stop them sleeping together. Meanwhile, Marshall begins to feel uncomfortable about using the toilet at work. Starring Josh Radnor and Cobie Smulders

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Lily's journey home after a trip to Seattle is disrupted by a blizzard, which threatens to interfere with her routine of meeting Marshall at airports after work trips. programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: North Yorkshire couple Carol and Steve are searching for a holiday home in Oliva, eastern Spain, so Danni Menzies shows them five properties for their £80,000 budget

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in East Sussex and Hertfordshire, with finds that include a Victorian egg incubator

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel to the West Midlands and London, where finds include a potato oven and an old petrol pump

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: As autumn sets in, Dick and Angel harvest their pumpkins in the walled garden and organise a family wheelbarrow race. The basement is the latest room to be transformed, serving as a nerve centre for the whole chateau, a space for storing deliveries, and Dick's workshop. The old piggery is also renovated, in anticipation of some new arrivals

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton helps a woman and her boyfriend build a dream home in Peebles, Scotland, where the whole ground floor is devoted to stables for her horses

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Swallows Rest in Weymouth, Dorset, where hosts Jane and Keith Smith are pulling out all the stops to win. However, the colour combinations in the rooms do not go down well with rival B&B owner Ray Chowdhury, and an afternoon of drawing starts some competition between Ray and newlyweds James and Darren Kosa-Jones

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants visit the Burley Inn in the New Forest, where newlyweds Darren and James welcome their guests. Donna and David prove to have a critical eye when they discover holes in the sheets, and Jane and Keith have a disagreement over a toilet roll. In the afternoon, the couple reveal their quizmaster skills, before Ray grills them on how they run their B&B over dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Hotel Montville in Redditch, Worcestershire for the third day of the competition, where first impressions of Ray Chowdhury's unique style and decor are positive. However, room inspections leave Jane and Keith Smith threatening not to stay, and the guests grill their host about his business background at dinner. Although some light relief is given in the form of ice sculpting, breakfast disappoints James and Darren Kosa-Jones, and Ray must face the harsh reality of his guests' opinions at feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit is to Donna and David's Silverton B&B in Shrewsbury, where the complimentary earplugs soon have Darren and James worrying about the noise from the road outside. A Segway race helps whip up the guests' competitive spirit, Donna gets emotional when her work-life balance is questioned, and chef David proves he can handle the unexpected at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. Accusations fly around the table as payments are revealed and the winner announced. Swallows Rest is first up and hosts Jane and Keith want to find out about Ray's colour preferences. Next Darren and James of the Burley Inn quiz Ray over his fussiness around their pine furniture. When it comes to the Silverton, B&B team Donna and David take umbrage with Jane and Keith's comments

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: An elephant calf is born at Chester Zoo, but its young half-sister doesn't welcome the new arrival. Meanwhile, bush dog dad Franco is under pressure as its family grows, and an onager - a rare type of wild horse - faces a major operation

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree enter their fifth year of living in France. With more weddings and events booked in than ever, the couple prepare for their busiest year yet. In order to feed a total of 1,500 guests, Dick and Angel begin renovating the back of the basement, creating a brand new, state-of-the-art events kitchen. Engineer Dick faces a complicated plumbing issue and there's a kitchen design challenge for Angel

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Anglican priests Neil and Ruth Mathieson share a love of all things Gothic and medieval. So when they decided to build their first-ever family home in the Adelaide suburb of Hillbank, it was no surprise that the City of Churches would provide plenty of ideas. Neil wanted a barn-inspired house with big, heavy timber beams so they chose to create a medieval manor built in the traditional way using methods from another time

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of Mimi and Andre d'Costa, who have moved to the Kent countryside to bring up their two children. They have a large plot of land and want to build a house that will be functional enough to serve their young family, but will also blend in with the beautiful landscape. They turn to architect Nick Eldridge, who designs a simple modular home using state-of-the-art materials and technologies

programme.title: Billion Pound Cruise
programme.desc: Daily life on the mammoth cruise ship the Symphony of the Seas, which boasts 20 pools and jacuzzis, two surf simulators, a rock-climbing wall, an ice rink, a basketball court and a mini golf course. It's all hands on deck for the crew members as 6,680 passengers arrive for the holiday of a lifetime

programme.title: Million Pound Mega Yachts
programme.desc: Documentary about the Monaco Yacht Show, where over 100 of the largest yachts on the water are up for sale, with billionaire buyers competing to own the most extravagant vessels. The programme follows those who make, buy and work on these craft, including a Soho businessman planning to sail around the world, a broker with 25 years experience looking to sell a £130 million yacht, and a billionaire installing a crystal chandelier in his floating palace

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Tom is rushed to St George's after crashing his bike head first into a parked car while racing a friend. Doctors order a CT scan to assess his injuries and must decide whether he will need emergency surgery to his face. Plus, 26-year-old Andy comes to A&E after injuring his knee during a game of Frisbee, and 51-year-old Jason arrives after suffering from blurred vision for two days

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, with Sean Lock and Sara Pascoe taking on Jon Richardson and Josh Widdicombe. Susie Dent is joined by Alex Horne and the Horne Section in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: The Accident
programme.desc: Harriet is in the dock for gross negligence manslaughter as the families' private prosecution finally arrives in court. Angela and the others have nearly bankrupted themselves to fund the case. Will it all have been worth it? Polly fears for Leona, who wants to give evidence, but it is her relationship with Iwan that presents her with the most challenging questions. Final episode of Jack Thorne's drama, starring Sarah Lancashire, Joanna Scanlan, Mark Lewis Jones and Sidse Babbett Knudsen

programme.title: Billion Pound Cruise
programme.desc: Daily life on the mammoth cruise ship the Symphony of the Seas, which boasts 20 pools and jacuzzis, two surf simulators, a rock-climbing wall, an ice rink, a basketball court and a mini golf course. It's all hands on deck for the crew members as 6,680 passengers arrive for the holiday of a lifetime

programme.title: Food Unwrapped

Kate Quilton goes in search of the perfect tomato and finds herself in the middle of the world's biggest food fight at a festival in Valencia, and Matt Tebbutt examines why tinned anchovies taste salty when fresh ones don't, visiting a processing plant to find out

Jasmine shows them five properties for their £150,000 budget

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

Engineer Dick faces a complicated plumbing issue and there's a kitchen design challenge for Angel

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton is in Birmingham, where he turns his attention to helping Paul and Ruby Singh to simplify their lives. Having spent the past seven years living hundreds of miles apart, the pair are now hoping to build a large family home together. Plans include lots of glazing and a deluxe-size kitchen, but even as Ruby works to keep the project within budget, costs have started to spiral out of control

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the King's Head in Addlethorpe, Lincolnshire, where landlady Helen Coy and her bar manager and best friend Emma Green are pulling out all the stops to win. The B&B owners are taken back to their childhood at the funfair, At dinner, B&B beginners Louise and Andy Macbeth rattle nerves when Louise reveals her past career as a hospitality journalist - leaving pub veteran Helen less than impressed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: B&B newcomers Andy and Louise Macbeth invite their rival hoteliers to spend the night at the dog-friendly Beck Hall in North Yorkshire, where an extra-critical Helen and Emma discover what they believe to be stray dog hairs in their bed. A fishing trip makes Terri feel a little out of sorts, and when the time arrives for feedback, the managers are surprised to learn two of their guests have indicated they would not come back for a second stay

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Albaston in Torquay for the third day of the competition, where they are welcomed by owners and avid souvenir collectors, Kevin and Julie Shadbolt. Terri and Stuart are impressed by their room, but are startled by the memorabilia in the communal lounge, and expectations are raised at dinner when Kevin reveals he has a secret recipe for success when it comes to breakfast. However, at feedback the next day, tensions begin to rise

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay of the week is in Bournemouth, at Terri and Stewart's specialist dance holiday venue the Hotel Piccadilly, where a class in the grand ballroom soon has the guests in a spin. However, temperatures rise over dinner when the simmering tension between Louise and Helen finally boils over

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners meet up for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. King's Head landlady Helen challenges Louise and Andy about the problems they reported on cleanliness in the bathroom. while Louise and Andy from Beck Hall get hot under the collar when the others criticise their dog-friendly approach

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Elderly one-eyed South African porcupine Roxy is introduced to a new, younger male called Henning, in the hope that she will find companionship in her old age. Kifaru, the oldest eastern black rhino at Chester Zoo, meets younger female Malindi, with the expectation that they will produce offspring to increase the dwindling population, while the Caribbean flamingos are breeding again

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: It's springtime at the chateau, and with the wedding season just a few weeks away, completing phase two of the basement project is becoming an urgent priority for Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree. To cater for all their summer guests, a much-needed utility and laundry room is about to be plumbed in. Angel comes up with a unique way of preserving the 150-year-old wallpaper, while Dick wrestles with a rake while working on the meadow

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Hardworking GP Zewlan Moor and her electrician husband Tom Naulty, who is now a stay-at-home father to their two children, want an architect-designed house in a great location on a shoestring budget. Working within a smaller budget soon encourages some radical thinking.

programme.title: Grand Designs Revisited
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits Francis and Karen Shaw to asses whether their efforts to save a peel tower in the heart of the Yorkshire Dales paid off. While the project was a chance to fulfil a childhood dream, the building's ancient status meant it was protected by numerous regulations. When the couple finally managed to get through the red tape, new and unexpected setbacks jeopardised the project and sent the budget spiralling out of control

programme.title: The Same Sky
programme.desc: At the Stasi Espionage Training Centre, 25-year-old Lars Weber is called upon to commence an assignment as a 'Romeo' spy, sent to West Berlin to romance and seduce a high-ranking intelligence analyst at Nato, a lonely 43-year-old divorcee, and to feed back any intelligence gained to his contact. Detective thriller, starring Tom Schilling, Sofia Helin and Friederike Becht. In German and English

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Seventy-five-year-old Gerry is rushed to A&E with a dangerously high heart rate of more than 250bpm, and doctors suspect an underlying chest infection is the cause. Meanwhile, 92-year-old Margaret arrives at St George's after falling over and hitting her head, and six-year-old Daniel is treated for an infected blister on his foot

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 43-year-old cyclist is brought to A&E after crashing face first into a car, with injuries are so severe that he was put into an induced coma at the scene. Meanwhile, 68-year-old Pat awaits the results of an X-ray after injuring her leg on holiday, and 89-year-old Adrian complains of chest pain

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

While trying to inject some much-needed flavour into the tired Mediterranean menu, the chef also encourages aunt-and-niece duo Faye and Brenda to settle their differences

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Heli-medics race to a skydiver who's suffered serious injuries after crashing into a house. There's a race across the country to reach a man who has fallen 40ft from a ladder. Plus, in Berkshire, biker Hanna is trapped with multiple injuries after hitting a road sign

programme.title: Food Unwrapped

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Competitive golf-loving couple Lynn and Mike from Southampton have been holidaying in Spain for 40 years and even lived there previously. They love it so much they now wish to now buy a holiday home there, so Danni Menzies lines up five options for their £60,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Tamsin is looking for her dream holiday home on the Greek island of Crete. She and her best friend Emma, who she has known since meeting at nursery school, have enjoyed many a holiday on the island, and now Tamsin is ready to have her own bolthole there. Laura Hamilton works within her budget of £100,000 to find a suitable property

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Tracey and Dean met in their early twenties and have devoted their lives to raising their family, including their own three children and two foster children. Now that they are finally in a position to buy a holiday home in the Mar Menor in Spain, Jasmine Harman is on hand to show them five properties for their £70,000 budget

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer revisit two couples who were previously featured on the show. Sam and Krystle were keen to move from their rented flat in Deptford into their own place, while long-distance partners Jason and Jaye were looking for a one-bedroom pad with outside space in Clapham or Brixton to finally bring them together

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows a thrill-seeking couple who face the tough challenge of creating their own home. Reuben Welch and April Marr have bought a 19th-century stone house in Leith, Edinburgh, and intend to restore the derelict property to its former glory - even though they have no construction experience

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Australian Natalie Dixon hosts the first dinner party in the Vale of Aylesbury, where she hopes that her Asian fusion menu will secure her the £1,000 prize. However, one of her guests - food regulation lawyer Greg Pearson - will be paying particularly close attention as he joins football stadium announcer Mike Botto, sales manager Bekki Jones and 74-year-old taxi driver John Feore at the table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Taxi driver John Feore hosts the second night in the Vale of Aylesbury, where the 70-year-old hopes to impress his guests with a traditional Irish roast dinner, complete with all the trimmings - but the septuagenarian cabbie struggles with the complex timings of the meal

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Competitive sales manager Bekki Jones hosts the third dinner party in the Vale of Aylesbury, where she tries to keep the mood light with stories of nudity and twin telepathy - but cabbie John manages to insult construction company boss Natalie Dixon by comparing her to Miss Piggy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Greg Pearson hosts the fourth party of the competition in the Vale of Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, and hopes that his food knowledge will be enough to secure a successful evening. However, fellow diner Bekki Jones is out for revenge after he criticised her dessert, and his guests are left underwhelmed as he tries to charm the group

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Last to host in the Vale of Aylesbury is football match announcer Mike Botto, who hopes his Italian-themed evening will secure him victory. He tries to impress with spaghetti Bolognaise, and enlists a Pavarotti impersonator to sing for his guests. However, Australian Natalie Dixon reveals that, unlike Mike, she knows what she is talking about when it comes to Italy. The fallout between Greg Pearson and cabbie John Feore also sours the mood

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Cholmeley Arms in Burton-le-Coggles, Lincolnshire, where chef John Berry and his wife Lesley hold a sausage-making competition for their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Islington Mill B&B in Salford, where Joe Spencer and Louise Woodcock have an alternative hosting style as their drag alter egos

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Third host Peter Morris welcomes guests to the Pebbles B&B in Seaton, Devon, but despite his breakfast award, not all of the guests are impressed by his culinary offerings

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Tarr Farm Inn on Exmoor, where Hilary Lester and Stacey Wade are proud of their five-star standards. However, Peter is on the warpath after his feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It is the last day of the competition and there is tension in the air, as Cholmeley Arms hosts John and Lesley want to get to the bottom of Peter's comments

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: In the Lake District, walker Philip calls on the Patterdale Mountain Rescue Team when a hike in the hills ends in a nasty break. Newquay Search and Rescue team prepare for a special visitor at base. And coastguard rescue teams work together to help Chrissy, who is seriously injured on a cliff near Cape Cornwall

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Beth, 68, is rushed to St George's after falling down a flight of stairs and badly breaking her ankle, meaning she faces emergency surgery and intensive physiotherapy to walk again. Leigh, 67, is admitted with head injuries after being knocked off his bicycle in a hit-and-run incident and medics are concerned he has suffered a severe trauma to his head as he was not wearing a helmet, while 26-year-old Luke arrives in A&E after an accident at work involving an electric saw

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Fifty-year-old motorcyclist Michelle is rushed to A&E after crashing head first into a lamp-post, with scans revealing that she has broken bones in her neck, arm and shoulder and requires emergency surgery. Timothy, 69, arrives at St George's after riding his bicycle into the back of a parked ambulance, while 33-year-old expectant mother Eleanor is admitted after cutting her thumb on a meat cleaver

programme.title: Father Ted

programme.desc: A respected academic goes on the run when he is framed for the murder of a French historian. Pursued by the detective on the case and a sinister assassin monk, he strives to unmask the culprit, leading to a conspiracy determined to preserve a 2,000-year-old secret at any cost. Thriller based on Dan Brown's novel, starring Tom Hanks, Audrey Tautou, Ian McKellen, Paul Bettany and Jean Reno

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The Falkirk wheel is the first and only rotating boat lift, capable of moving 600 tonnes of boat and water over a 25-metre height difference in just minutes

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: Stratolaunch is designed to lift rockets, spacecraft and experimental high-speed hypersonic planes into the stratosphere, then release them for their onward journey into space

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston investigates theories that Hitler faked his suicide at the end of the Second World War and may have escaped from his Berlin bunker

programme.title: WW2 - Battles for Europe
programme.desc: Hitler's launch of his great counter-offensive against the unsuspecting Allies in the Ardennes. This was the Nazis' last gamble in the West to turn the tide of the war

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Durham Cathedral, where she examines a collection of rare books, including an early version of the Magna Carta, and John Axford examines a rare 19th-century plate. Objects brought in to be valued include a carriage clock found on a bomb site, an early drawing by Laura Knight, a 19th-century missionary's medical kit and a collection of football memorabilia

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A highway built in the Brazilian jungle as an escape route in the event of an emergency at a nuclear power station, a Soviet fortress and Ellis Island hospital

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his journey across Ireland, travelling from Navan to Mullingar. Along the way, he gets up to speed with modern archaeology in County Meath, where he uncovers a controversial Victorian dig at the sacred Hill of Tara. Later, he investigates leaping salmon in Leixslip, and in Mullingar, bangs the drum for the town's traditional marching band

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his Irish journey from Dromod to Sligo. Along the way he discovers how the landscape inspired the poet WB Yeats and learns to make a potato pancake

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit the Royal William Yard in Plymouth, where they are given the chance to cast their eyes over a number of potentially valuable items. On the waterfront, militaria expert Graham Lay has doubts about a pair of doorknobs thought to have belonged to Admiral Horatio Nelson. The team is impressed by a chess set made from parts of the aircraft carrier HMS Ark Royal, and a psychedelic painting of a band that performed at Woodstock intrigues Clive Stewart-Lockhart. Plus, jewellery specialist John Benjamin marvels at a diamond necklace the length of a skipping rope, donated to the city of Plymouth by Lady Astor

programme.title: Restoration Workshop
programme.desc: Gary Wallis visits Kempton Park Autojumble. He buys a tired vintage Moto Guzzi bike and transforms it into stunning display piece

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: A fully relocatable polar research station in Antarctica, which was inspired by a revolutionary icebreaking ship and ingenious designs for pre-fabricated buildings

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The programme looks at a mysterious group of rusting ships stranded in an arid desert, and a monstrous defensive line on the snow-covered peaks of the Italian Alps

programme.title: WW2 - Battles for Europe
programme.desc: The Allies reached the last great natural barrier between their forces and the German heartland. If they could get across the River Rhine, the war would be won

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A mile-and-a half of recently-excavated trenches, bunkers, barracks, and gun encasements near Pointe du Hoc, which tell a new story of D-Day

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On the last leg of Michael Portillo's long journey from Wexford to Westport, a fashionable Victorian seaweed bath is followed by a steamy scene in Ballina. On tenterhooks in Foxford, Michael discovers the visionary charity of an entrepreneurial nun, learns of a double tragedy at Clew Bay and begins a pilgrimage to the summit of Croagh Patrick, Ireland's holy mountain

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: British bombers are unable to hit their targets precisely and attack German cities under cover of darkness, while the Blitz in Britain brings public demand for revenge strikes, and Arthur Harris takes charge of Bomber Command

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The Falkirk wheel is the first and only rotating boat lift, capable of moving 600 tonnes of boat and water over a 25-metre height difference in just minutes

programme.title: Impossible Engineering

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Rene finds himself involved in multiple murder plots when the universally unpopular General Von Klinkerhoffen decides to become more involved in controlling the district

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston investigates the truth behind the story of the man in the iron mask, who was held in the Bastille from 1698 to 1703, and may have been imprisoned for 40 years

programme.title: WW2 - Battles for Europe
programme.desc: The Allies reached the last great natural barrier between their forces and the German heartland. If they could get across the River Rhine, the war would be won

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit the Royal William Yard in Plymouth, where they are given the chance to cast their eyes over a number of potentially valuable items. On the waterfront, militaria expert Graham Lay has doubts about a pair of doorknobs thought to have belonged to Admiral Horatio Nelson. The team is impressed by a chess set made from parts of the aircraft carrier HMS Ark Royal, and a psychedelic painting of a band that performed at Woodstock intrigues Clive Stewart-Lockhart. Plus, jewellery specialist John Benjamin marvels at a diamond necklace the length of a skipping rope, donated to the city of Plymouth by Lady Astor

programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents from Plymouth's Royal William Yard. One visitor discovers the brooch she bought in a charity shop is much older than she thought

programme.title: Restoration Workshop

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

He then heads towards London, and discovers a favoured haunt of King Edward VII, before sampling the monarch's favourite tipple, the King's Ginger

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo arrives in Croydon, where he hears the story of a mixed-race composer who was once celebrated but is now forgotten. At the Three Bridges station, he is delighted to find a recently built depot and its fleet of new Class 700 trains - and is given the great honour of washing one down. In Lewes, he makes a beeline for Charleston, the home of artists Vanessa Bell and Duncan Grant, and in Shoreham-by-Sea, Michael discovers how magnificent Edwardians in flying machines took off from the oldest licensed airport in the country

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Paul Hollywood delves into his family history, finding out about his maternal grandfather's experiences in the Second World War, serving as an anti-aircraft gunner in Tunisia and Italy. The Great British Bake Off judge then digs deeper, learning about his Scottish ancestry - and how one of his forebears held down a very demanding job

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: British-born actress Jane Seymour knows there is Jewish ancestry on her father's side of the family, but beyond that she knows very little, other than her own suspicions that they suffered in the Holocaust. As she researches her paternal great-aunts Jadwiga and Michaela, she soon finds out more about their experiences under Nazi occupation. The search takes her to Warsaw and France, uncovering stories of life in a ghetto and a terrifying flight to Switzerland from the Germans

programme.title: Top of the Pops

programme.title: Steam Train Britain
programme.desc: Meeting the Welsh Highland Railway's oldest volunteer fireman, 80-year-old Cedric Lodge, who has worked on the railways for 60 years. In Devon, there is a look at the Autotrain

programme.title: Steam Train Britain
programme.desc: Great Central Railway's Scott Manley takes a rainy busman's holiday working as a guard at Bury, while a team of volunteers in Wales try to keep the line clear of overgrown plants

programme.title: Atlantic: The Wildest Ocean on Earth
programme.desc: Cillian Murphy narrates a documentary examining the lives of animals and people pitting themselves against the world's wildest ocean, unveiling the natural forces that underpin life in the Atlantic, from the world's most powerful currents, ferocious hurricanes and huge chains of undersea volcanoes. The first episode looks at the influence of the Gulf Stream, with whales, giant turtles and jellyfish riding the huge current that becomes a migration super-highway and helps warm northern Europe, while fishermen battle for survival in mountainous seas as they try to exploit its natural fertility

programme.title: Atlantic: The Wildest Ocean on Earth
programme.desc: Documentary examining the animals pitting themselves against the world's wildest ocean, unveiling the natural forces that underpin life in the Atlantic. In the vast South Atlantic, huge pods of dolphins, massive penguin colonies and the largest gathering of marine mammals on Earth pack chains of extraordinary islands, created by powerful volcanic forces far below them. Meanwhile, the nutrient-rich upwellings create profusions of life in some areas, and the abyssal depths host a world of bizarre creatures in others

programme.title: Atlantic: The Wildest Ocean on Earth
programme.desc: Life in the tropical Atlantic, where everything from dolphins, manatees and whale sharks to sunbathing jellyfish thrive in the Caribbean's warm, sheltered waters, fringed by coral reefs and rich mangrove forests. But when extreme heat in Africa unleashes terrifying hurricanes, all hell breaks loose across the region
