However, Tracey Durrant declares she only likes the best-quality beef, and determines to refuse to eat the hostess's offerings before she has even arrived at the party

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Recruitment manager Rob McNamara presents the third dinner party in Stoke-on-Trent. Despite rarely cooking and never having played host before, he is confident he has a chance of winning the £1,000 cash prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty parlour owner Michelle Minter delivers a gourmet menu at the penultimate dinner party in Stoke-on-Trent, featuring crostini with pork fillet and mushroom pate, and a twice-baked souffle. The atmosphere is tense after last night's argument, so everyone is relieved when Tracey gets stuck in traffic and they have to start without her

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: City councillor Matt Wilcox hosts the final dinner party in Stoke-on-Trent, hoping to impress with unusual dishes including a bucket of bones and his spicy twist on a local stew. He also lines up musical entertainment and lets an artist decorate the table, while Michelle tries to get an apology from Tracey before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman examines the least developed area of the Costa del Sol on behalf of Sue and Brian, who visit Spain every year and have fallen in love with its traditional culture and outdoor lifestyle. The pair now want to spend up to six months at a time in Axarquía, but need to find a suitable property to call home

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman meets Peter and Karen Williams from Shropshire, who fell in love with Portugal's eastern Algarve 12 years ago and now want to relocate there permanently. Jasmine finds them five homes suited to their £150,000 budget, including a property reduced by £50,000, and a house that feels just like their place back in the UK

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests check in to the Preston Hotel in Yeovil, owned by father and son Bis and Deep Oozageer. Ann and Rebecca find their room more cheap than cheerful, although an afternoon tasting the produce at a cider brandy distillery proves a massive hit

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: A property valuer and teaching assistant meet for the first time as they buy a house together at auction in Merseyside - then have six months to renovate and sell it for a profit

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray make their wills, but struggle to pick guardians for the children. They finally manage to decide - but not everyone is happy about the arrangement. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is upset by her hippie sister's decision to become a nun, and resolves to prove her new-found faith is just a phase. Comedy, starring Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay travels to the El Greco restaurant in Austin, Texas, where the owners have resorted to using a microwave to prepare their 'authentic' Greek dishes. Gordon faces the difficult task of uniting a squabbling family before tackling the bigger problem of a business on the brink of collapse

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Lela's, a California restaurant that is currently being run into the ground by its inexperienced owner. Gordon tries to turn the failing business around, but faces opposition from the chef and makes enemies when he exposes the suspect behaviour of some members of staff

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: With their children flying the nest, Andy and Alida have decided now is the time to fulfil their dream of buying a chalet in the French Alps. They are downsizing their house in Wokingham, Surrey, and splitting the funds between the UK and France, so Laura Hamilton and Jonnie Irwin have been sent on a joint mission. With a total of £650,000 to spend, and three shots each to find the perfect property - Laura in Berkshire and Jonnie in the ski-resort of Morzine - the pressure is really on for both of them to deliver

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sean and Ian would love a holiday home on Gran Canaria near their favourite town of Vecindario. Laura Hamilton lines up five properties within their budget of £125,000

programme.title: Autumn at Jimmy's Farm
programme.desc: Following life on Jimmy Doherty's farm during the autumn months, as the team prepare the farm and wildlife park for the incoming seasonal changes

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: An edition focusing on the behaviour of teenage boys, with frontline staff in Northamptonshire and across the country saying they are becoming more violent. PC Kathleen Roberts responds to a suspected acid attack carried out by a teenager in Northampton, while Sgt Martin Waller is dispatched to the scene of a suspected gang-related stabbing

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The award-winning celebrity challenge comes to Channel 4, with Greg Davies as the all-powerful Taskmaster and Alex Horne (the show's creator) as his sidekick, setting all manner of perplexing and downright extraordinary tasks for five contestants from the comedy world - Johnny Vegas, Katherine Parkinson, Daisy May Cooper, Mawaan Rizwan and Richard Herring. They'll be facing giant bears, disappearing cows and flying eggs as they begin their campaign to win the ultimate prize - Greg's golden head

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Dating show in which singletons meet up with possible partners at a restaurant in the hope of finding love, before deciding whether they want to take things further

programme.title: Married at First Sight
programme.desc: The Covid-19 pandemic sets in just as the couples prepare to move in together, putting an unprecedented additional strain on their fledgling relationships. As measures ease, Owen and Michelle face a heartbreaking dilemma, while David and Shareen come together to enjoy a romantic glamping getaway

programme.title: Five Guys a Week
programme.desc: Based in Caerphilly, south Wales, 51-year-old Sharon lost her virginity in her teens and got pregnant on that very same night. A grandmother by the age of 40, she's always devoted her time and energy to her family. However, now they've all flown the nest, she wants to put herself first for a change. Prompted by this desire, she invites a globe-trotting sales executive, a cycling enthusiast, a removals company boss, a fitness enthusiast and a forklift driver to move in with her, hoping that one of them can prove a partner for life

programme.title: The Bridge
programme.desc: Plumber Luke and hotel entertainer Maura return from their clandestine overnight mission with a huge secret that could jeopardise the bridge build. As bad weather and dubious construction methods hamper the team's progress, Zac's leadership is called into question. With the team way behind schedule, two new arrivals make a surprise entry into the camp

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: Mair and Dafydd, strangers in the Welsh town of Neath who have never owned a home before, are given a lump sum to buy a property, then renovate and sell it

programme.title: Animal Airport
programme.desc: A look behind the scenes of Heathrow Airport's Animal Reception Centre and the people who work there

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first of the week's dinner parties in Medway, Kent, is hosted by experimental cook and retired grandmother Nina Gaskell. Her guests are barmaid Laura Leibo, police worker Esther Kennedy, mortgage adviser Michael Dodsworth and art graduate Patrick Fysh, and she hopes to impress them with her unusual dishes including a cucumber stuffed with corned beef, and gravy with coconut

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barmaid Laura Leibo hosts the second party in Medway, Kent, but struggles to cope with the stresses of the task. She hopes her improvised cheesecake and questionable gravy will be forgotten when she invites her guests to take part in a robotic dance-off in her kitchen - with Nina Gaskell grabbing the opportunity to show off a hidden talent

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Police communications officer Esther Kennedy hosts the third dinner party in Medway, Kent. She has very high standards and believes everything has to be just so, with nice cutlery, matching plates and impeccable glassware. But the key thing is her gourmet menu, which may or may not prove a hit with her fellow diners. However, Esther does end the night by treating her guests to an impromptu rock performance

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Actor Patrick Fysh hosts the fourth dinner party in Kent, and hopes to impress with his molecular gastronomy. However, Michael Dodsworth is confused by the 21-year-old's interest in surrealist feminist art, and Nina Gaskell is left speechless by risque pictures of his girlfriend

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Michael Dodsworth hosts the final dinner party in Medway, Kent, and decides to keep his menu simple by preparing Thai chicken cakes, jambalaya and raspberry and lime sorbet. He also arranges games including pinata, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps married couple Hilary and Alan from Liverpool search for a new home in the Spanish region of Alicante, with a budget of £160,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton offers advice to Liverpool couple John and Wendy Houghton, who have been married for 43 years and have long dreamt of owning a holiday home around the Spanish coastal town of Torrevieja on the Costa Blanca. The property expert leaves no stone unturned in showing the pair how far their budget of £50,000 will stretch, with the couple viewing a two-bedroom apartment with scenic vistas and a ground-floor apartment located by a picture-perfect square

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Grange Farm Park in Maltby le Marsh, Lincolnshire, which is run by mum and daughter team Ann Graves and Rebecca O'Brien

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: A couple team up with a stranger to buy a house in Porthmadog, north Wales, but find they have differing visions for the property over six months of renovation

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra upsets Ray by comparing him to his irritating cousin Gerard, so he sets out to seek reassurance from his family. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Fred Stoller

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra spends a whole day cooking with Marie in an effort to get along with her mother-in-law, while Ray reluctantly agrees to take Robert and Frank to a car show.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Atlanta, Georgia, in an attempt to save a family run smokehouse restaurant plagued by mismanagement and lazy cooking. Michon's owner, Al Wilson, had always hoped he could pass his beloved business on to daughter Natalie, but when he suffered a collapsed lung the handover came about much earlier than expected. Now it's down to Gordon to motivate Natalie and save Michon's from disaster

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to transform the fortunes of Sebastian's, a pizzeria in Burbank, Los Angeles, which is failing to attract customers, leaving the owner in debt and struggling to support his family. Gordon is horrified to discover pre-processed and frozen ingredients on the menu, but there seems to be little he can do to help when he is thrown out of the kitchen

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton and Jasmine Harman help Bob and Judith choose between the rugged coastline of northern Norfolk and the sunny beaches of the Costa Blanca on a budget of £230,000

programme.title: The Greatest Showman (2017)
programme.desc: After losing his job as a bank clerk, PT Barnum creates and develops his circus in New York in the mid-1800s with the help of playwright Phillip Carlyle and an adopted family of entertainers shunned by society. Musical drama, starring Hugh Jackman, Zac Efron, Michelle Williams, Rebecca Ferguson and Zendaya

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present the halfway point of the culinary contest, with pastry week. The bakers must put their own stamp on a Cornish classic and are set a retro technical challenge. For the showstopper round, they must concoct a classic tart in a pastry cage, before judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood decide who will be this week's star baker and who will be going home

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Sean Lock and Harriet Kemsley take on Jon Richardson and Chris McCausland in the words-and-numbers quiz. Nick Helm joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Mo Gilligan and Babatunde Aleshe are among the famous faces hitting the couch for a special episode for this year's Stand Up to Cancer appeal. programme.title: Adult Material
programme.desc: Stella goes head to head with Jolene's former employers as her day in court arrives and she is finally forced to confront her past, while Carroll attempts to salvage his friendship with Jolene as loyalties are ruptured. Meanwhile, when the lost tape and her test results go public, Amy is forced to leave porn and begins escorting

programme.title: Guy Martin's War Machines
programme.desc: The presenter looks back on some of his favourite engineering projects involving military vehicles. The programme features the restoration of a Mark 1 Spitfire, the recreation of a First World War tank which was one of the earliest armoured vehicles the final flight of an Avro Vulcan, and a reenactment of a paratrooper drop from D-Day

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Single mother Siobhan Parkinson hosts the first dinner party of the week in Merseyside. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Electrician Justin Sumner hosts the penultimate dinner party in Mersey and is determined to impress his guests by creating a Chinese-themed menu from scratch. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef heads to the Seascape restaurant in the village of Islip on Long Island, New York, in a bid to change the fortunes of its owner, who is nearly $1million in debt. programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners' marriage apart. programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Charlie's Italian bistro in La Verne, southern California, where the owner's lack of business nous is putting her relatives' homes at risk, after her mother and sister put them up as collateral. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third dinner-party challenge from Doncaster is hosted by trading standards manager Tracey Hewer. She hopes to win her guests over with a barrage of cupcakes, but the diners soon spot that her efforts have focused more on presentation than the taste of the food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lecturer Signe Jase hosts the penultimate dinner party in Doncaster, preparing an adventurous menu of Latvian delicacies including herring salad and salted salmon. However, fussy eater Tracey refuses to try much of the food, which leaves Martyn unimpressed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Part two of two. In the last-ever episode of the US sitcom, the four friends all reach a crossroads in their lives. Karen has found an unlikely partner, while Jack is still looking for someone to love, and Will and Grace decide whether to raise a child together. Starring Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: The US sitcom about a man and woman sharing a flat - and a platonic relationship - returns after an 11-year break. Politics come between Will and Grace when he crushes on a Republican senator and she gets a new interior design contract - for the White House itself. Eric McCormack and Debra Messing star

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: The kids insist on squandering their pocket money, so Michael makes a misguided effort to teach them to manage their finances properly

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael becomes addicted to a video game, making Jay believe he does not love her anymore. The pair agree to see a psychiatrist - who proves to be an equally fanatical player

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A woman owes five months' rent, but refuses to leave unless the bailiffs arrive, while a man wanted to sell his house post-breakup, but the tenants are still there five years later. Plus, a man happily living in his garden shed

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord seeks urgent advice from eviction specialist Chris after finding his three-bedroom terrace has been stripped bare of the fittings, the flooring, and even the grass on the lawn. Landlady Rose gets a shock when she finally gains access to her property, and Dave from Peterborough Council's housing team comes across some of the worst damp and mould he has ever seen. Plus, Selina and Lee must return from America for a court case to recover £10,000 rent arrears on their UK property

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The enforcement agents try to mediate a dispute in a takeaway, and deal with rent evaders living in potentially deadly conditions. Plus, a businessman faces financial ruin

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The debt collection agents grapple with emotional evictions and moral dilemmas during the festive period, including a young family in Crystal Palace who are made homeless when the landlord repossesses their home because he wants to redevelop the property. The eviction comes as a shock to the family as they are up to date with their rent, but have just one hour to gather their belongings. Plus, an acrimonious divorce in Chessington comes to a head when the estranged wife obtains a writ to reclaim the house, and an off-licence owner in Hampshire with unpaid rent of more than £5,000 battles to keep his business open just as everything shuts down for the holidays

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Elmore are met with lies and aggression when they track down nearly £3,000 owed by a garage mechanic, while Steve and Ben encounter a retired couple who are being forced to leave their home. Stuart and Vic revisit a young debtor who owe £750 for a laptop computer, and in Oxfordshire, Paul and Steve chase £30,000 owed by a world-famous Formula One racing team

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Iain head to Manchester, where a landlord is owed £8,000 in rent arrears and has already called for police back-up. As tempers rise, the pair must find a way to handle a situation that is spiralling dangerously out of control. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase £3,000 owed to a firm of letting agents, before tracking a debtor who was accidentally over-paid for a job. Plus, Stewart and Iain face an eviction that is set to test their patience

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Members of Essex's high-speed police interception unit chase a lorry driver across three counties. Elsewhere, the team's adapted vehicles are pushed to speeds of up to 115mph while in pursuit of a joyrider. The officers also get the chance to hone their skills with the Subaru World Rally team

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Members of Essex's high-speed police interception unit pursue a stolen BMW X5, and the Stanway team gives two unsuspecting car thieves an early morning wake-up call. Elsewhere, officers discover a vehicle that has been turned into a four-wheeled petrol bomb, and a road-tax evader encounters trouble with the law

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: With Ned's exhibition approaching, Yashvi is bothered by Scarlett's involvement, and Dipi and Pierce are guilt-ridden during Shane's dinner party

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Roo and Owen try to find some alone time, Marilyn is unsure about the speed of her developing relationship, and Mackenzie and Ari discuss the future after Ari's proposal to Tane

programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. In three days, the pair bring the grubbiest homes back to life

programme.title: 10 Years Younger in 10 Days
programme.desc: After years looking after her family, mum of two Julie has decided it is time to focus on herself. She wants to fling out the frumpy wardrobe and inject some glamour into her ageing appearance. Her first stop is a trip to a cosmetic physician to find out if her sagging skin can be lifted without resorting to surgery. Ex-police officer Amanda wants to go back to the fun-loving party girl she once was so she agrees to try the latest catwalk trends, gets a make-up lesson and faces her fear of the dentist to tackle her damaged teeth

programme.title: Rich Kids, Skint Holiday
programme.desc: Luke, a wealthy Essex teenager, goes on holiday with the single-parent Bull family from Stoke-on-Trent. They are watching every penny as they enjoy a break in Barmouth, north Wales

programme.title: The Craft (1996)
programme.desc: A new girl who finds it difficult to fit in at school befriends three goth misfits, who discover they can perform magic and form a secret coven. They initially use their powers for self-improvement, but eventually start to turn against their classmates, driving the ringleader insane as her lust for power takes over. Horror, starring Robin Tunney, Fairuza Balk, Neve Campbell, Rachel True and Skeet Ulrich

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: A young boy called Skip knocks on Jack's door, claiming to be his grandson. Jack has become estranged from artificially conceived son Elliot, who is now paying a visit to New York along with his family. The unexpected joy of being reunited quickly fades when Skip reveals he is also gay and that his parents plan to send him to a therapy camp in the hope of 'fixing him'. Horrified, Jack and Will resolve to do whatever they must to 'save' Skip - even if it means Will making out with the camp counsellor. Eric McCormack and Sean Hayes star

programme.title: My Wife and Kids

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: The family goes on a road trip hoping to learn more about American history - a journey that is ruined by the police, authentic colonial food and Jay's neurosis about her weight. Comedy, starring Damon Wayans

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Kate faces trouble from unruly tenants, who became anti-social, and are now trying to sue her for serving them an eviction notice. Dhiren relates how the existing tenant of a house he bought stopped paying rent as soon as he took ownership, and Tim explains how a health scare left him seeking to sell his property - but a standing occupant refused to leave

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Claire and Simon seek eviction specialist Chris's help to evict a man claiming to be renting their old family home. Meanwhile, Hamza hopes to get his council flat back after he tried to help a neighbour's friend by letting them stay for a week, but ended up being shut out when they refused to leave. Plus, a man is almost £30,000 in debt and in danger of repossession after his tenants stopped paying the rent

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Elmore are met with lies and aggression when they track down nearly £3,000 owed by a garage mechanic, while Steve and Ben encounter a retired couple who are being forced to leave their home. Stuart and Vic revisit a young debtor who owe £750 for a laptop computer, and in Oxfordshire, Paul and Steve chase £30,000 owed by a world-famous Formula One racing team

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Iain head to Manchester, where a landlord is owed £8,000 in rent arrears and has already called for police back-up. As tempers rise, the pair must find a way to handle a situation that is spiralling dangerously out of control. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase £3,000 owed to a firm of letting agents, before tracking a debtor who was accidentally over-paid for a job. Plus, Stewart and Iain face an eviction that is set to test their patience

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben face a challenging eviction in London, where a vulnerable tenant in rent arrears has barricaded her front door, and the agents receive a tirade of abuse. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase a debt of nearly £2,000 in Surrey, before trying to recover almost £3,000 in Northamptonshire. Finally, Steve and Ru head to Portsmouth to evict a young family for a landlord who wants her property back

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner are in Birmingham on a potentially dangerous, full-scale eviction of a large traveller community. Meanwhile, in London's diamond district Brian O'Shaughnessy and Delroy Anglin are chasing nearly £6,000 owed by a jeweller to an unhappy customer, although a solicitor tries to convince Delroy his client owes nothing

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The high-speed police interception unit pursues a stolen car through the suburbs of Essex until the thieves turn into a cul-de-sac and, though seemingly trapped, still try to escape. Elsewhere, officers deal with a fight outside a nightclub and tackle boy racers in Southend

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Four police cars pursue a vehicle speeding down the M25, an 83-year-old man fails to notice officers trying to pull him over, and the Stanway unit arrives at the scene of a car crash on a country road. The interceptors join up with the Kent force to launch a road-policing initiative that uses automatic number-plate recognition to scan vehicles on major routes

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The tale of an elderly couple whose hopes of a peaceful retirement were ruined when their tenants stopped paying rent, then moved in their abusive friends who became squatters. With the house becoming a free-for-all and in a terrible state of repair, and the couple facing a barrage of verbal threats and abusive behaviour, they have been forced to seek help in an attempt to get their property back. Plus, a man who cannot sell his house because his sitting tenant refuses to leave

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Wiltshire couple Edward Lea and his wife found their happy retirement was short-lived when an imposing 8ft breeze-block wall - dubbed the Great Wall of China - was built by their neighbour between their properties. In Scotland, Karen Ryrie and her elderly mother are fed up with living opposite John Tyer, his three dogs and a huge family of rabbits. Following their complaint about the smell, Karen's subsequent accusation of assault has made the dispute far more serious. Elsewhere, Linda Bird had not been expecting to wear headphones around the house when she moved to Bedfordshire for a quiet life, but the issue has escalated beyond excessive noise to become a battle over boundaries with neighbour Stanislav Fajdel

Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Martin unfairly accuses Golden Eye of stealing his hat and Nils of eating all the berries

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Nils dreams of going to see a solar eclipse, so the flock take off to watch it

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: The geese come up against a thunderstorm, and an exhausted Akka nearly leads them into a cliff face

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls take on the Mixed Tapes on a game show, but their rivals cheat by exploiting their worst fears

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls are tricked into appearing on a reality show in the Himalayas, only to find the director has set up booby traps all over the mountains to make things more interesting

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls go on a cruise where single people look for love, and help one of their fellow passengers win the heart of a famous actress

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls perform at a princess's coronation ceremony, only to be accused of stealing an ancient jewel

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: The British Transport Police deal with an injured passenger and two disgruntled tourists. Meanwhile, a team of miners aims to prevent a billion-pound London Underground project from hitting the buffers, and a couple celebrate their first anniversary

programme.title: D-Day: The Shortest Day
programme.desc: Survivors provide a compelling insight into the D-Day landings, discussing the preparations, their actions, and the consequences of an operation which had such a crucial bearing on the outcome of the Second World War

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Medical journalist Michael Mosley and a team of doctors offer advice on health, using their expertise and the latest research to investigate the truth behind various claims being made in the media. Surgeon Gabriel Weston takes part in an experiment at the University of Surrey's Sleep Research Centre to discover whether an extra hour in bed could have major benefits, while A&E specialist Dr Saleyha Ahsan asks if people can be overweight and still healthy, and tests the accuracy of two different methods used to assess fatness

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: A Handful of Dust (1989)
programme.desc: A couple's life is disrupted by a penniless woman who arrives for the weekend, setting in motion a disastrous sequence of events. Drama, starring Judi Dench, whose performance won her a Bafta award, and James Wilby

programme.title: The Boy Who Stole a Million (1960)
programme.desc: A boy robs a bank to pay for repairs on his father's car, and is pursued by the police and criminals after the money. Comedy adventure, starring Virgilio Teixeira and Maurice Reyna

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Susan decides to go back to her husband, while Ash gets some help from the Navy in learning hoe to dispose of new German land mines

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: The British Transport Police deal with an injured passenger and two disgruntled tourists. Meanwhile, a team of miners aims to prevent a billion-pound London Underground project from hitting the buffers, and a couple celebrate their first anniversary

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: Regular guest Alexander, Crown Prince of Yugoslavia, returns to stay in the suite in which he was born in 1945. There are also visits by actress Joan Collins, writer and comedian Stephen Fry and the Emperor of Japan, as well as 85-year-old former bookmaker Gerry Parker, who has breakfasted at Claridge's for the past 40 years. General manager Thomas Kochs takes any change very seriously and oversees every decision necessary - from new alarm clocks to a £10million renovation plan

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey makes an appointment with a Harley Street specialist, hoping to allay her suspicions that she may be pregnant. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Mike steadfastly resists a management attempt to make the staff wear identical uniforms, convinced it's a move designed to rob them of their individuality _ but a visit from Anne's surprisingly attractive mother soon diverts his attention to more personal matters. Comedy, starring Martin Freeman, Susan Earl and Ken Morley

programme.title: The Returned (2013)
programme.desc: A young doctor goes on the run with her bitten boyfriend and their remaining supplies of a protein used to treat a zombie virus. Sci-fi horror, starring Emily Hampshire, Kris Holden-Ried and Shawn Doyle

programme.title: The Weekend (2016)
programme.desc: Three friends stumble across £100,000, and spend it all on a shopping spree and a wild party. However, thwey then discover that the money belongs to a feared gangster - and he expects them to pay back every penny. Comedy, starring Joivan Wade, Percelle Ascott and Dee Kaate

programme.title: Essex Vendetta (2016)
programme.desc: An ordinary man is drawn into the dangerous world of organised crime as he strives to protect his family. His new life in the Essex underworld leads to him being sent on a murderous mission to Malta, where he discovers his partners in crime are not to be trusted. Crime drama, starring Michael McKell, Kris Johnson and Danniella Westbrook

programme.title: Drive My Car
programme.desc: Short film parodying 1970s car adverts

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: 16th-century Europe was a hotbed of tense international intrigue. Mary Stuart and Elizabeth I confront one another on matters religious, political and personal

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: The British Transport Police deal with an injured passenger and two disgruntled tourists. Meanwhile, a team of miners aims to prevent a billion-pound London Underground project from hitting the buffers, and a couple celebrate their first anniversary

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Nils finds a map in a bottle on a Scandinavian island which shows the hiding place of Ulrik the Green's treasure

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Akka decides to make Nils, Martin and Gorgo take an exam on general goose knowledge

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Nils has promised to take a beaver to an island where he can live safely

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Nils and Gorgo search for provisions, and discover a hidden store of food

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The band performs in an underwater base, only to discover that anyone who spends too long down there starts to go mad

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: Kylie suffers a knock on the head while stranded in the jungle which leaves her convinced she is a monkey

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: A magic mask gives Kate a vision of herself travelling through space, so she decides to quit the band and pursue her destiny of becoming an astronaut

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: Dr Frank Enstine erases Kylie and Kim's memories, and Kate has to remind them who they are in time for a concert

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: A specialist team prepares for the Christmas lights switch-on, one of the most important nights on the London thoroughfare's calendar. Singer Cheryl Fernandez-Versini has been booked to push the button, and it is essential that everything is in place ready for the big moment. Meanwhile, the Metropolitan Police pickpocket team has an eventful weekend, and a light 400 feet above the ground needs replacing on a landmark building. Plus, a chat with the personal shopper giving the British public advice on how to dress well

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: Regular guest Alexander, Crown Prince of Yugoslavia, returns to stay in the suite in which he was born in 1945. There are also visits by actress Joan Collins, writer and comedian Stephen Fry and the Emperor of Japan, as well as 85-year-old former bookmaker Gerry Parker, who has breakfasted at Claridge's for the past 40 years. General manager Thomas Kochs takes any change very seriously and oversees every decision necessary - from new alarm clocks to a £10million renovation plan

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Michael Mosley and the team are in Chester to learn about an experiment to find out whether standing up a few more hours each day could have major health benefits. Gabriel Weston witnesses a womb transplant, Saleyha Ahsan shows how to stop someone choking and Chris van Tulleken finds out if vitamin supplements are important to wellbeing

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: The Fast Lady (1963)
programme.desc: A cycling enthusiast on a modest civil servant's salary gives up his beloved bike to a buy a luxury car to impress a local magistrate's daughter. However, he first has to pass his driving test to stand any chance of winning her heart - and in the process ends up in a wild car-chase after a gang of robbers. Comedy, with Julie Christie, Stanley Baker, James Robertson Justice, Leslie Phillips and Dick Emery

programme.title: Hell Is a City (1960)
programme.desc: A tough criminal escapes from jail and hatches a scheme to rob a wealthy bookie, little realising a hardened copper is hot on his trail. Thriller, starring Stanley Baker, John Crawford, Donald Pleasence and Billie Whitelaw

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash deals with the Nazis latest secret weapon, while Salt disobeys orders one time too many

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: A specialist team prepares for the Christmas lights switch-on, one of the most important nights on the London thoroughfare's calendar. Singer Cheryl Fernandez-Versini has been booked to push the button, and it is essential that everything is in place ready for the big moment. Meanwhile, the Metropolitan Police pickpocket team has an eventful weekend, and a light 400 feet above the ground needs replacing on a landmark building. Plus, a chat with the personal shopper giving the British public advice on how to dress well

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey makes an appointment with a Harley Street specialist, hoping to allay her suspicions that she may be pregnant. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: Former Guns N' Roses star Slash talks to Ronnie about his career in rock music and selects some of his favourite records, as well as discussing his lifelong enthusiasm for guitars

programme.title: Oasis
programme.desc: Profile of the Gallagher brothers, who formed Oasis in the early 1990s and have gone on to sell more than 70 million albums

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: The landmark series from the 1970s takes a look at the origins of jazz and challenges the theories that it is a black music form which was created in New Orleans. Featuring contributions and footage from Miles Davis, Duke Ellington, Charlie Mingus and Louis Armstrong

programme.title: Hallows Eve (2016)
programme.desc: Shadowy figures in masks begin appearing around an estate with a reputation for street crime, and leave behind graffiti warning of their intent to take over the area on Halloween. The members of a street gang vow to take a stand against the invaders, but are unprepared for the shocking truth behind their enemies' masks. Horror, starring Sarah Akokhia and Ethan Taylor

programme.title: Silent Scream (1990)
programme.desc: A former soldier is sentenced to life in prison after murdering a bartender in 1960s Soho. During his incarceration, his violent behaviour gets more and more out of control, until prison doctors assign him an experimental treatment to help him come to terms with the roots of his rage. Prison drama, starring Iain Glen and Robert Carlyle

programme.title: Queen of the Blues (1979)
programme.desc: Two brothers buy a failing Soho nightclub and hope to turn its fortunes around - but they end up being threatened by gangsters demanding protection money. Fortunately, salvation is at hand in an enthusiastic stripper, who comes up with a plan to save the day. Drama, starring Mary Millington and Rosemary England

programme.title: 3 Steps to Heaven (1995)
programme.desc: A man's body is found in the Thames, and his girlfriend is convinced he was murdered. Adopting a series of disguises, she sets out to find the last three men to see him alive, and discover the truth about what happened - but is unprepared for the secrets she uncovers about the man she thought she knew. Drama, starring Katrin Cartlidge, Frances Barber and James Fleet

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Camden and Sydenham for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show

programme.title: Walks Around Britain

programme.title: Nils Holgersson

programme.desc: The band gets trapped in the Bermuda Triangle while heading for Jamaica

programme.desc: Five youngsters living in the Channel Islands discover a plot to smuggle valuable birds' eggs out of the country. Children's adventure, starring Mavis Sage and Jennifer Beach

programme.title: The Captain's Table (1959)
programme.desc: A gruff cargo skipper is given the command of a luxurious liner, but finds it difficult to mind his manners among the upper-class passengers. Comedy, with John Gregson, Donald Sinden, Peggy Cummins and Reginald Beckwith

programme.title: Calculated Risk (1963)
programme.desc: An ex-convict plans one last daring heist, by tunneling into a bank vault through the basement of a neighbouring house. Crime drama, starring William Lucas and John Rutland

programme.title: A Handful of Dust (1989)
programme.desc: A couple's life is disrupted by a penniless woman who arrives for the weekend, setting in motion a disastrous sequence of events. Drama, starring Judi Dench, whose performance won her a Bafta award, and James Wilby

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tour exploring Wapping for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: Regular guest Alexander, Crown Prince of Yugoslavia, returns to stay in the suite in which he was born in 1945. programme.title: Oasis

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: A 47-year-old man receives a shock when consultant surgeon Shaw Somers reveals he is suffering from metabolic syndrome and his body is more like that of a 60-year-old. A 23-year-old woman seeks help with her extremely bad breath, GP Giovanni Miletto puts together an experimental plan to combat chronic fatigue syndrome, and Pixie McKenna discovers how diet can influence people's chances of developing cancer

programme.title: Iranian Embassy Siege
programme.desc: Interviews with those involved in the 1980 Iranian Embassy Siege and footage of the dramatic SAS operation that brought it to an end

programme.title: K-Shop (2016)
programme.desc: A Bournemouth takeaway owner despairs of his drunken, abusive customers and is finally pushed to the limit when his father is killed in a violent altercation. He begins murdering the people who make his life a misery, and disposes of the bodies by making them into kebabs. Horror, starring Reece Noi and Ewen MacIntosh

programme.title: Heyday TV

programme.desc: A young doctor goes on the run with her bitten boyfriend and their remaining supplies of a protein used to treat a zombie virus. Sci-fi horror, starring Emily Hampshire, Kris Holden-Ried and Shawn Doyle

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present another star-filled edition of the unorthodox general knowledge quiz, challenging more famous faces to come up with the least likely correct answers to a series of questions posed to members of the public. This time, the celebrity duos come from the world of fashion, with Brix Smith-Start teaming up with Jonathan Phang, Amy Childs joining forces with Sam Faiers, Grace Woodward pairing with Brendan Courtney, and Lee Stafford partnering Nicky Clarke

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Former EastEnders bad girl Charlie Brooks (Janine) and retired England rugby union player Ben Cohen (Strictly Come Dancing) tackle a series of fiendishly difficult challenges testing skill, dexterity, reaction, wit and wisdom. Cheered by on friends and family in the studio, they're under intense pressure to hold their nerve and avoid slip-ups inside The Cube as they aim for the £250,000 charity jackpot. Each given nine lives at the start, the contestants can also use 'simplify' and 'trial run' lifelines to make the job a little easier. Phillip Schofield is the host

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Emmerdale actor Christopher Bisson (Jai Sharma), retired rugby player Gareth Thomas, BBC Breakfast presenter Naga Munchetty and McFly drummer Harry Judd compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by pitting their general knowledge against one of the show's resident trivia experts. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Bradley Walsh hosts

Phillip Schofield is on hand to provide words of encouragement

programme.desc: Anthony Joshua v Eric Molina. Action from the heavyweight clash, which was the second defence of home favourite Joshua's IBF World Title and took place at Manchester Arena. programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: Revisiting Washington Redskins' 1987 Super Bowl victory over Denver Broncos at the Jack Murphy Stadium in San Diego, California. Despite trailing the Broncos 10-0 at the end of the first quarter, the Redskins battled back in spectacular fashion, scoring 35 unanswered points in the second quarter alone, as they went on to a secure a memorable 42-10 victory
